title: T-019 — UI: RPT-005 OEE Summary (/reporting/oee-summary, consumer 15-OEE) — grouped bar + gauge + trend (12-REPORTING §15.1 RPT-005, §6 D-RPT-9)
prompt:
# T-019 — RPT-005 OEE Summary UI (consumer 15-OEE)

PRD: docs/prd/12-REPORTING-PRD.md §15.1 RPT-005, §4.1 #5, §6 D-RPT-9 (consumer of 15-OEE)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/reporting/kpi-screens.jsx:169-310 (`rpt_oee_summary`)
UX: prototypes/design/12-REPORTING-UX.md:387-419

## Goal
Server Component page `/reporting/oee-summary` rendering: grouped bar (A/P/Q per line w/ 85% target ReferenceLine), gauge ring (today-so-far overall OEE), OEE trend table (Spark sparkline + 7-day avg footer), Shift Comparison nested table (AM/PM rows), cross-module 'Open 15-OEE' link with 'Consumer of 15-OEE' badge per D-RPT-9. Graceful degradation if 15-OEE module not deployed.

## Prototype parity
- Source: `kpi-screens.jsx:169-310`
- Translation: RPT_OEE_BY_LINE / RPT_OEE_TREND mock → T-011 oee-consumer getOeeDailySummary; ChartGroupedBar → Recharts BarChart grouped (A/P/Q bars) + ReferenceLine 85%; GaugeRing → Recharts RadialBarChart or custom SVG; Spark in trend table memoised; 'Consumer of 15-OEE' badge MUST remain in production UI.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/(reporting)/oee-summary/page.tsx` (RSC) — calls T-011 getOeeDailySummary; if `available=false`, render full placeholder card with 'OEE module not deployed' message + link to /admin/modules.
2. Client component renders grouped bar + gauge + trend table + shift comparison.
3. 'Consumer of 15-OEE' badge MUST be visible in header (D-RPT-9 ownership communication).
4. Cross-module 'Open 15-OEE' link → router.push('/oee') (route may not exist yet — show disabled if 15-OEE absent).
5. Empty / loading / error / permission states; RTL + Playwright parity.
6. All labels via next-intl `reporting.oee_summary.*`.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/oee-summary/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/oee-summary/_components/oee-summary-client.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/_components/charts/gauge-ring.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/_components/charts/grouped-bar-chart.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(reporting)/oee-summary/__tests__/oee-summary.test.tsx [create]
- apps/web/messages/{en,pl}/reporting-oee-summary.json [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given 15-OEE module is deployed and oee_daily_summary has seeded rows for org_A, when /reporting/oee-summary renders, then grouped bar shows A/P/Q per line, ReferenceLine at 85%, gauge ring shows overall OEE, trend table shows sparklines + 7-day footer.
2. Given 15-OEE module is NOT deployed (T-011 returns available=false), when page renders, then full-card placeholder is shown with 'OEE module not deployed' message; no errors thrown; charts are absent.
3. Given the page renders, when DOM is inspected, then 'Consumer of 15-OEE' badge is present in header (D-RPT-9).
4. Given user clicks 'Open 15-OEE', when 15-OEE module is deployed, then router.push('/oee'); if not deployed, button is disabled with Tooltip.
5. Given user without rpt.dashboard.view, when accessing /reporting/oee-summary, then middleware T-009 403s + audits.
6. UI parity + 4 states + next-intl wrapping.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: RTL covers MV-present + MV-absent paths; parity vs prototype; gauge/bar render assertions; cross-module link disabled state.
- Playwright parity.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web test oee-summary && pnpm --filter @monopilot/web playwright test reporting-oee-summary`.
- GREEN: build page + client + chart components.

## Risk red lines
- Do not query oee_daily_summary directly — use T-011 getOeeDailySummary consumer wrapper.
- Do not omit the 'Consumer of 15-OEE' badge (D-RPT-9 ownership communication).
- Do not crash when 15-OEE module is absent — graceful placeholder per T-011.
- Do not duplicate OEE aggregation logic (D-RPT-9 con-clause).
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not skip next-intl wrapping.
- Do not skip 4 states.
